3 Ideas You Might Have Missed
read time 2 minutes
Welcome to the Curiosity Chronicle Week in Review—a quick roundup of this week's ideas to help you build a high-performing, healthy, and wealthy life.
My first book has sold over 250,000 copies worldwide since its release three months ago. The hardcover currently has a big 32% sale. I’d LOVE for you to grab a copy and join this movement to redefine success and wealth!
This Week at a Glance:
- Monday: The Hidden Tax Holding You Back
- Wednesday: The Most Powerful Asymmetries in Life
- Friday: The Statistical Oddity That May Save Your Life
Wisdom Worth Sharing:
A lesson I wish I learned earlier:
It’s perfectly ok to live a life that’s confusing to others. Go to bed at 8. Wake up at 4. Eat real foods. Go on long walks. Obsess over one thing. Read old books. Don’t gossip. Be loved by a few. Recipe for a good life.
([share to x/twitter!](https://click.convertkit-mail4.com/lmu0onn873fmhnv7d3rf6h89v6v00cg/wnh2hghqklml9eh7/aHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9pbnRlbnQvdHdlZXQ_))
Monday: The Hidden Tax Holding You Back
There are certain taxes of life—like loneliness, hard conversations, and imposter syndrome—that you must happily pay to achieve the things you want. But there is one tax that must be rejected: The Ignorance Tax.
The Ignorance Tax is the hidden cost of what you haven’t learned or what you’re choosing to ignore. It’s the gap between where you are and where you could be if you gained the knowledge, skills, perspective, or awareness you’re currently lacking.
Where are you paying the Ignorance Tax in your life right now?
Identify it. Address it. Eliminate it.
([read the full piece here](https://click.convertkit-mail4.com/lmu0onn873fmhnv7d3rf6h89v6v00cg/reh8hohm3oko96c2/aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2FoaWxibG9vbS5jb20vbmV3c2xldHRlci90aGUtaGlkZGVuLXRheC1ob2xkaW5nLXlvdS1iYWNr))
Wednesday: The Most Powerful Asymmetries in Life
I define an asymmetry as an action with an asymmetric return profile:
- If it doesn't work out, the cost is small
- If it does work out, the reward is large
This list of 44 powerful actions—across careers, growth, relationships, health, and money—will help you live an asymmetric life. Pick 1–2 from each category and start today.
([read the full piece here](https://click.convertkit-mail4.com/lmu0onn873fmhnv7d3rf6h89v6v00cg/08hwh9h29pnp0psl/aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2FoaWxibG9vbS5jb20vbmV3c2xldHRlci90aGUtbW9zdC1wb3dlcmZ1bC1hc3ltbWV0cmllcy1pbi1saWZl))
Friday: The Statistical Oddity That May Save Your Life
Anscombe's Quartet is a statistical oddity that reveals a key truth:
Your life is analyzed on paper, but lived in reality. The data you see from the air may create the illusion of certainty, but it's the data you live on the ground that creates the experience.
The lesson: Stop overthinking every decision. Stop overanalyzing. Stop trying to create the perfect plan on paper. Your reality will be defined on the ground.
([read the full piece here](https://click.convertkit-mail4.com/lmu0onn873fmhnv7d3rf6h89v6v00cg/8ghqhoho27w7e8uk/aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2FoaWxibG9vbS5jb20vbmV3c2xldHRlci90aGUtc3RhdGlzdGljYWwtb2RkaXR5LXRoYXQtbWF5LXNhdmUteW91ci1saWZl))
